title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
description: A romantic novel following Elizabeth Bennet as she navigates issues of manners, upbringing, morality, and marriage in early 19th-century England.

title: Don Quixote
author: Miguel de Cervantes
description: The story of a Spanish gentleman who loses his sanity and decides to become a knight-errant, roaming the world to right wrongs.

author: George Orwell
description: A dystopian novel set in a totalitarian society under constant surveillance, exploring themes of government overreach and individual freedom.

title: Moby-Dick
author: Herman Melville
description: The epic tale of Captain Ahab's obsessive quest to hunt down the white whale that maimed him.

title: Wuthering Heights
author: Emily Brontë
description: A passionate and tragic tale of love and revenge set on the Yorkshire moors, centering on Heathcliff and Catherine Earnshaw.
